notes: SHIP v1.14.318 - move the Command ghost + the EXIT button left ~1/2 inch (owner in chat: 'the ghost need to move to the left 1/2 inch and the Exit too'). 1/2 inch = 48px in CSS (1in=96px reference px). (2) EXIT `body.rd #rd-exit` gained margin-right:48px (pulls EXIT 48px in from the nav's right edge - done via right MARGIN rather than a position shift so it can NEVER overlap the CRASH CART tab; the flex reflow shrinks #bn-rail by 48px so the 3 tabs get slightly narrower but the reactor rail stays thirds-aligned). Gates: whole-file brace balance 11891/11891 UNCHANGED (pure value edits, no structural change), all 4 inline <script> blocks vm.Script-compile clean, version triple .317->.318 lockstep, uniform LF, ?legacy=1 byte-identical (#pg-cmd ghost + #rd-exit are redesign-scoped). NOTE: 48px is the CSS-literal half-inch; if it reads as more/less than 1/2 inch on John's phone (device pixel density differs) it is a one-number tune.
